hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && ! echo "$file" | grep -qE '(node_modules|dist|build|\.prisma)'; then npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|DELETE FROM .* WHERE 1|rm -rf /opt|git push --force|git reset --hard)'; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠️ Destructive command detected: $cmd\", \"continue\": true}"; fi
